Explore sports
What the system delivers

It's the oxygen that counts, not just the pressure.

How much oxygen is actually delivered depends on three things working together: the pressure, the built-in breathing system (BIBS) that supplies the oxygen, and the flow rate. HPO.TECH delivers all three. Many chambers reach the pressure but miss the rest.

See the science
Oxygen delivery
Dissolved oxygen in plasma up to 12345 mL per 100 mL plasma · at 2.4 ATA
Delivered pressure2.0–2.4 ATA
Oxygen flow rate20 L/min
BIBS mask → inhaled oxygen concentration100% → 94%

Why Thrive

A clinic owner. Not just a supplier.

David runs an active hyperbaric clinic in Bath and works with Bath Rugby, using the same chambers you'd own. His team handles everything from specification to handover - and you pay HPO.TECH directly, at the same price as going direct.

Talk to David Read the buying guide
